projectDescription: A TypeScript SDK for integrating casino game clients with the Stake Engine Remote Game Server (RGS) API, handling authentication, game rounds, balance tracking, and currency formatting.
keyFeatures: Session-based authentication with the Stake Engine RGS API
Game round lifecycle management (Play and EndRound)
Real-time balance tracking via window event emitters
Automatic idle balance refresh every 60 seconds
Jurisdiction compliance flags for feature gating
Bet level enforcement with configurable override
Multi-currency display formatting with 35+ supported currencies
publicApiSurface: RGSClient(options) — factory function to create a client instance
client.Authenticate() — authenticate session and retrieve config/balance
client.Play(params) — place a bet and receive round result
client.Event(eventValue) — send a custom game event
DisplayAmount(balance, options) — format a balance with currency symbol
ParseAmount(val) — convert RGS internal amount to decimal
parseBalance(balance) — parse raw API balance to typed Balance object
window event: balanceUpdate — emitted on every balance change
window event: roundActive — emitted on round state changes
